name: Cuddle Sesh | Zani
description:
`Want cuddle? Pls? Come home, made food.'

You felt like cuddling with your girlfriend.

Plus, she does deserve a break from that hefty job of hers.

——

(If you were a future user, know that this was made before release. High-effort bot, very lore heavy. I'm just obsessed with her, even though the drip-marketing just released. And shorekeeper, might come back to update later on. Also, first bot on J ai wish me luck on my bot making journey, and I hope this was well made for ya. Tell me it's good or nah.)
creator: Scarlett Ash
